passes.findings: Mainstream QFT describes particles as field excitations. Matt Strassler vs. David Hestenes on 'standing wave' literalness. Identified gaps in fermions, Zitterbewegung, and QCD/Higgs mapping.

passes.focus: Technical Gaps: Fermions, ZBW, Confinement, Higgs, Knots
passes.findings: Fermion exclusion derived from 4π rotation/phase coherence (Weight 2). QCD confinement mapped to Color Dielectric Model ($n 	o 0$ vacuum). Higgs field as refractive/stiffness medium (Frequency Shift). Photons as topological knots (Rañada/Trueba). Zitterbewegung observed indirectly via electron channeling (Gouanère).

passes.focus: Technical Synthesis: Weight (2,1), Feynman Vertex Mapping, Q_boson = 1/3, ZBW Status
passes.findings: Formal derivation of Weight (2,1) from configuration space topology ($\pi_1(M) \cong \mathbb{Z}_2$ vs. $\pi_1(M) \cong 0$). Feynman vertices mapped to non-linear wave mixing (Four-Wave Mixing) in vacuum. Q_boson = 1/3 prediction tested against Higgs/W/Z masses (0.9% error). Michel Gouanère's 80.874 MeV channeling experiment confirmed as the gold standard for ZBW/internal clock.

open_gaps: Renormalization Group (RG) flow analysis: Does Q_boson = 1/3 run to the observed 0.336 at pole masses?
Technical mapping of Orbifold CFT (Varma 2026) to the Propagation Framework's axioms.
Formal derivation of the 4π rotation requirement for phase coherence in 3D from Axiom 3 (Coherence).
next_pass: Renormalization Group (RG) flow analysis of Koide-like mass ratios.
